item.title: Tragic Hotel Incident: Girl's Fatal Fate
item.description: A tragic hotel incident leads to a girl's fatal outcome, as this true crime story examines the case and its aftermath.

media:content.media:description: A tragic hotel incident leads to a girl's fatal outcome, as this true crime story examines the case and its aftermath.

item.title: A Doctor’s Oath Turned Into a Criminal Case
item.description: A true crime case about a man who swore to save lives but did the opposite, raising serious questions about trust and accountability.

media:content.media:description: A true crime case about a man who swore to save lives but did the opposite, raising serious questions about trust and accountability.

item.title: Inside the Mind of Katherine Knight
item.description: A look at the case of Katherine Knight and the events that made it one of Australia’s most notorious true crime stories.

media:content.media:title: Inside the Mind of Katherine Knight

item.title: He Hid His True Side From His Wife
item.description: A true crime story about a man who concealed his real life from his wife, revealing a hidden side that changed everything.

item.title: One report that helped spark a movement
item.description: A single report to police became a turning point for a broader movement focused on justice and awareness.

item.title: Nearly Impossible to Keep Locked Up
item.description: A true crime case about a person who repeatedly challenged confinement and proved difficult to keep in custody.

item.title: If Only Someone Had Listened to Her Last Words
item.description: A true crime story centered on a victim’s final words and the missed warning signs that followed.
